title: barleria albomarginata
intro: Barleria albomarginata, also known as the white-edged barleria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Barleria albomarginata include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Barleria albomarginata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
